title: Jamaican Chickpea Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious bowl filled with Jamaican-spiced chickpeas, roasted vegetables, and a hint of smokiness.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the roasted red peppers and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the chickpeas, Jamaican jerk seasoning, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the chickpeas are coated in the spice mixture.
Stir in the coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook for an additional 5 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve the chickpea mixture hot, garnished with fresh cilantro and roasted vegetables.
Optional: Serve with steamed rice or over a bed of greens.
